remember: Students will be able to recall the major concepts of biodiversity and conservation.
Students will be able to remember the different types of biodiversity and conservation strategies.
Students will be able to recall the importance of conservation of biodiversity.
understand: Students will be able to understand the causes of decline in biodiversity.
Students will be able to understand the role of human activities in loss of biodiversity.
Students will be able to understand the concept of ecosystem services.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of conservation strategies to real-life scenarios.
Students will be able to apply the concepts of biodiversity to evaluate the impact of human activities on the environment.
Students will be able to apply the principles of conservation biology to develop sustainable practices.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of human activities on biodiversity.
Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of different conservation strategies.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between biodiversity and ecosystem services.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concepts of biodiversity and its importance.
Describe the different types of biodiversity.
Explain the causes of decline in biodiversity.
Discuss the role of human activities in loss of biodiversity.
Explain the concept of ecosystem services and its importance.
Describe the different conservation strategies for biodiversity.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of biodiversity and its importance.
Describe the different types of biodiversity and their characteristics.
Explain the causes of decline in biodiversity and the impact of human activities on it.
Discuss the role of conservation strategies in preserving biodiversity.
Explain the concept of ecosystem services and its importance in maintaining biodiversity.
